rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Termination Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2019 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT VLADIMIR ABRAMOV Ntc Of Mtn For Termination Of Sanctions is transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on January 17, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID RAYNOR ET AL VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF DAVID RAYNOR, ERIN DOLLY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction The Court is inclined to appoint a Special Master to address the issues raised in this motion. Hearing Required for parties to address (1) the timeline for the parties to meet and confer to agree on a Special Master; and/or (2) the timeline for submission of two names of proposed Special Master by each side. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SF SAN BRUNO, LLC, LA COSTA LOANS HOLDINGS, LLC, RICHARD SHRIGLEY JR DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the demurrer in good faith. A valid Proof of Service by mail on file. Plaintiff's improper request for transfer of venue made 2 court days before the hearing is DENIED without prejudice to file a properly noticed motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint, Filed By Defendants La Costa Loans, Inc. And Richard Shrigley
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SF SAN BRUNO, LLC, LA COSTA LOANS HOLDINGS, LLC, RICHARD SHRIGLEY JR Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint, Filed By Defendants La Costa Loans, Inc. And Richard Shrigley is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the motion in good faith. A valid Proof of Service by mail on file. Plaintiff's improper request for transfer of venue made 2 court days before the hearing is DENIED without prejudice to file a properly noticed motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ZEHNER ET AL VS. DAVID VAN DER VOORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID VAN DER VOORT, TOMMI WEST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 16, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than January 2, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
